SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class ChatMessageItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.ChatMessageItem
public class ChatMessageItem extends Object
Represents a single chat message within a thread.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ChatMessageItem()
    creates an empty chat message object for Firebase
    ChatMessageItem(String messageId, String senderUid, String senderName, String text, long sentAt)
    creates a chat message object

    Description

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ChatMessageItem

      public ChatMessageItem()
      creates an empty chat message object for Firebase

    • ChatMessageItem

      public ChatMessageItem(String messageId, String senderUid, String senderName, String text, long sentAt)
      creates a chat message object
      Parameters:
      messageId - the String id of the message
      senderUid - the uid of the user who sent the message
      senderName - the name of the user who sent the message
      text - the text content of the message
      sentAt - the time the message was sent

  • Method Details

    • getMessageId

      public String getMessageId()
      gets the message id
      Returns:
      the String id of the message

    • setMessageId

      public void setMessageId(String messageId)
      sets the message id
      Parameters:
      messageId - the String id of the message

    • getSenderUid

      public String getSenderUid()
      gets the sender uid
      Returns:
      the uid of the user who sent the message

    • setSenderUid

      public void setSenderUid(String senderUid)
      sets the sender uid
      Parameters:
      senderUid - the uid of the user who sent the message

    • getSenderName

      public String getSenderName()
      gets the sender name
      Returns:
      the name of the user who sent the message

    • setSenderName

      public void setSenderName(String senderName)
      sets the sender name
      Parameters:
      senderName - the name of the user who sent the message

    • getText

      public String getText()
      gets the message text
      Returns:
      the text content of the message

    • setText

      public void setText(String text)
      sets the message text
      Parameters:
      text - the text content of the message

    • getSentAt

      public long getSentAt()
      gets the time the message was sent
      Returns:
      the time the message was sent

    • setSentAt

      public void setSentAt(long sentAt)
      sets the time the message was sent
      Parameters:
      sentAt - the time the message was sent
